abilities.description: Lowers Defense of all Pokémon except itself.

abilities.name: Tablets Of Ruin
abilities.description: Lowers Attack of all Pokémon except itself.

abilities.name: Beads Of Ruin
abilities.description: Lowers Special Defense of all Pokémon except itself.

abilities.name: Orichalcum Pulse
abilities.description: Turns the sunlight harsh when entering battle, and boosts Attack while active.

abilities.name: Hadron Engine
abilities.description: Creates an Electric Terrain when entering battle, and boosts Special Attack while active.

abilities.name: Opportunist
abilities.description: Copies stat boosts by the opponent.

abilities.name: Cud Chew
abilities.description: Causes the Pokémon to reuse an already consumed Berry at the end of the next turn.

abilities.name: Sharpness
abilities.description: Powers up slicing moves.

abilities.name: Supreme Overlord
abilities.description: Attack and Special Attack are boosted for each party Pokémon that has been defeated.

abilities.name: Costar
abilities.description: Copies ally's stat changes on entering battle.

abilities.name: Toxic Debris
abilities.description: Scatters poison spikes at the feet of the opposing team when the Pokémon takes damage from physical moves.

abilities.name: Armor Tail
abilities.description: Prevents the opponent from using any moves that have priority, such as Quick Attack.

abilities.name: Earth Eater
abilities.description: Restores HP when hit by a Ground-type move.

abilities.name: Mycelium Might
abilities.description: Status moves go last, but are not affected by the opponent's ability.

abilities.name: Minds Eye
abilities.description: The Pokémon ignores changes to opponents' evasiveness, its accuracy can't be lowered, and it can hit Ghost types with Normal- and Fighting-type moves.

abilities.name: Supersweet Syrup
abilities.description: Once per battle, when a Pokémon with Supersweet Syrup enters the battle, it lowers the evasion stat of all adjacent opponents by one stage.

abilities.name: Hospitality
abilities.description: When a Pokémon with Hospitality enters a battle, it restores HP for an ally by 25%.

abilities.name: Toxic Chain
abilities.description: May cause bad poisoning when the Pokémon hits an opponent with a move.

abilities.name: Embody Aspect
abilities.description: Embody Aspect boosts a particular stat, depending on the form of a Terastallized Ogerpon

abilities.name: Tera Shift
abilities.description: When Terapagos enters the battle, it turns into its Terastal Form until the end of the battle.

abilities.name: Tera Shell
abilities.description: All damage-dealing moves that hit the Pokémon when its HP is full will not be very effective.

abilities.name: Teraform Zero
abilities.description: As soon as Terapagos assumes its Stellar Form, it will immediately neutralize weather and terrain effects.

abilities.name: Poison Puppeteer
abilities.description: Pokémon poisoned by Pecharunt's moves will also become confused.
